name: @prism/daemon
description: pnpm wrapper around the Rust prism-daemon crate — owns the wasm build pipeline, browser E2E suite, and the Capacitor mobile bridge (mobile/ios, mobile/android). The Rust source of truth lives in src/ and Cargo.toml; this package.json exists so pnpm/turbo can drive `cargo` and Playwright on the same build the Studio app consumes.

scripts.build:wasm: pnpm run build:wasm:dev && pnpm run build:wasm:prod
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:wasm:dev && pnpm run test:e2e:dev && pnpm run build:wasm:prod && pnpm run test:e2e:prod
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:unit:wasm-feature && pnpm run test:e2e
